rules.name: MissingPrerequisiteBlocker
rules.description: A course with unmet prerequisites cannot be recommended for enrollment.

rules.name: Maximum next-term credits
rules.description: Plans above the student's max next-term credits require advisor approval.

rules.name: AdvisorApprovalRequired
rules.description: The analytics capstone requires advisor approval.

rules.name: Exception requests require advisor approval
rules.description: Requests for exceptions or overrides require human advisor review.
